articles.title: Superstar Kane produces his biggest England moment
articles.description: Harry Kane's England career is filled with great moments - his World Cup rescue act against DR Congo in Atlanta is his greatest, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

articles.title: Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble tells BBC she will give him 'mother's warmth'
articles.description: Kleiber Moran, 2, was rescued on Wednesday, six days after last week's deadly earthquakes.

articles.title: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
articles.description: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.

articles.title: From Truman's pension to Trump's billions - a White House windfall unmatched by any president
articles.description: Historians say Trump's $2.2bn income last year is unprecedented and blurs the line on conflicts of interest.
